product_overview: This is a simple frontend application with a public home page, an authentication page, a shop page, and a protected admin dashboard. Users can access the app content, sign in, and view the available shop experience, while admin content is restricted to authenticated users.
core_goals: Visit the public home page to understand the app
Sign in to access authenticated areas
Access the admin dashboard after authentication

features.name: Home Page
features.description: Provides the public landing page for users to start exploring the app.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the home page

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows users to enter their login details and sign in to the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill login details -> Click login button -> See authenticated access granted

features.name: Shop Page
features.description: Lets users browse the shop area of the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop -> See the shop page

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provides authenticated users access to the admin area.
user_flows: Sign in -> Navigate to /admin -> See the admin dashboard
